chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1500 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case. 16-10-2025 Mr. Amir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for respondents-SEPCO. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. **** Learned counsel for the respondents–SPECO files a statement along with certain documents, which are taken on record, and a copy thereof is provided to the learned counsel for the petitioner. Mr. Shaikh submits that the entire amount has been paid to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner confirms the same and, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
